name: SGBSTDN
description:
Student Base Table.

For all Majors, Minors, and Concentrations, consult STVMAJR. If all are in one query, you will need multiple JOINS. See example queries.

queries.name: Most Recent Record for Student
queries.description: Find the most recent SGBSTDN record for each student.

queries.name: 1st Major, Minor, Concentration for Student
queries.description: Find the 1st major, minor, and concentration for each student based on the most recent SGBSTDN record.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_PIDM
columns.description: Internal unique identifier for the student. JOIN on this.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_STST_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the students status for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_STST_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the students status for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_LEVL_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the level code of the student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_STYP_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the student type for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_TERM_CODE_MATRIC
columns.description: This field identifies the effective term of matriculation. Almost always null here.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_TERM_CODE_ADMIT
columns.description: This field identifies the term student was first admitted to institution.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_EXP_GRAD_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies expected graduation date. Can change based on type/pacing.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_CAMP_CODE
columns.description: This field SHOULD identify the campus location associated with the student for the effective term. However, it is almost always null here.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_FULL_PART_IND
columns.description: This field identifies whether the student is a full or part-time student. Almost always null here. My recommendation is to do calculations based on a sum of SFRSTCR_CREDIT_HR, or use SFBETRM_TMST_CODE, defined in STVTMST.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_SESS_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the session student is attending for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_RESD_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the residency status of the student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_COLL_CODE_1
columns.description: This field identifies the college associated with the primary curriculum for the effective term..

columns.name: SGBSTDN_DEGC_CODE_1
columns.description: This field identifies the degree within the primary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_1
columns.description: This field identifies the primary major within the primary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_MINR_1
columns.description: This field identifies the primary minor within the primary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_MINR_1_2
columns.description: This field identifies the secondary minor of the student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_CONC_1
columns.description: This field identifies the primary concentration within the primary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_CONC_1_2
columns.description: This field identifies the secondary concentration within the primary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_CONC_1_3
columns.description: This field identifies the third concentration within the primary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_COLL_CODE_2
columns.description: This field identifies the college within the secondary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_DEGC_CODE_2
columns.description: This field identifies the degree within the secondary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_2
columns.description: This field identifies the primary major within the secondary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_MINR_2
columns.description: This field identifies the primary minor within the secondary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_MINR_2_2
columns.description: This field identifies the secondary minor within the secondary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_CONC_2
columns.description: This field identifies the primary concentration within the secondary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_CONC_2_2
columns.description: This field identifies the secondary concentration within the secondary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_CONC_2_3
columns.description: This field identifies the third concentration within the secondary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_ORSN_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the orientation session assigned to the student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_PRAC_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the practical training experience of the student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_ADVR_PIDM
columns.description: This field identifies the internal identification number for the advisor assigned to the student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_GRAD_CREDIT_APPR_IND
columns.description: This field identifies eligibility of student to take graduate courses for credit for the effective term. Valid values are Y or blank only.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_CAPL_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies career plan of the student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_LEAV_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies reason of leave of absence of student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_LEAV_FROM_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the begin date of leave of absence of student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_LEAV_TO_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the end date of leave of absence of student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_ASTD_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the academic standing override for a student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_TERM_CODE_ASTD
columns.description: This field identifies the term associated with the academic standing override.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_RATE_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies a specific assessment rate of the student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the most current date record was created or updated.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_1_2
columns.description: This field identifies the secondary major within the primary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_2_2
columns.description: This field identifies the secondary major within the secondary curriculum for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_EDLV_CODE
columns.description: A two position alphanumeric field which indicate the highest level of the education that the student completed

columns.name: SGBSTDN_INCM_CODE
columns.description: A two position alphanumeric field which indicate the income range of the student

columns.name: SGBSTDN_ADMT_CODE
columns.description: Admissions type from the admissions application

columns.name: SGBSTDN_EMEX_CODE
columns.description: General Student Employment Expectation Code

columns.name: SGBSTDN_APRN_CODE
columns.description: General Student Apprenticeship Code

columns.name: SGBSTDN_TRCN_CODE
columns.description: General Student Transfer Center Code

columns.name: SGBSTDN_GAIN_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the employment and training code of the student for the effective term.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_VOED_CODE
columns.description: General Student Vocation Eduaction Status Code

columns.name: SGBSTDN_BLCK_CODE
columns.description: Block Schedule Code

columns.name: SGBSTDN_TERM_CODE_GRAD
columns.description: Term student intends to graduate.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_ACYR_CODE
columns.description: Year student intends to graduate.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_DEPT_CODE
columns.description: Department Code.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_SITE_CODE
columns.description: Site Code. 01, 02, 03 are most common (Tahlequah, Muskogee, BA). Def table has addresses!

columns.name: SGBSTDN_DEPT_CODE_2
columns.description: Department Code for second curriculum.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_EGOL_CODE
columns.description: Educational Goal code.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_BSKL_CODE
columns.description: Student Basic Skills Code

columns.name: SGBSTDN_PRIM_ROLL_IND
columns.description: Indicates whether the Primary Curriculum should be Rolled to Academic History

columns.name: SGBSTDN_PROGRAM_1
columns.description: Curriculum 1 Program Code

columns.name: SGBSTDN_TERM_CODE_CTLG_1
columns.description: Curriculum 1 Catalog Term Code

columns.name: SGBSTDN_DEPT_CODE_1_2
columns.description: Curriculum 1 - Department 2

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_CONC_121
columns.description: Concentration Code 1 on Second Major of First Curriculum

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_CONC_122
columns.description: Concentration Code 2 on Second Major on First Curriculum

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_CONC_123
columns.description: Concentration Code 3 on Second Major on First Curriculum

columns.name: SGBSTDN_SECD_ROLL_IND
columns.description: Indicates whether the Secondary Curriculum should be Rolled to Academic History

columns.name: SGBSTDN_TERM_CODE_ADMIT_2
columns.description: Admission Term Code associated with the Secondary Curriculum

columns.name: SGBSTDN_ADMT_CODE_2
columns.description: Admissions Type Code associated with the Secondary Curriculum

columns.name: SGBSTDN_PROGRAM_2

columns.name: SGBSTDN_CAMP_CODE_2

columns.name: SGBSTDN_DEPT_CODE_2_2
columns.description: Curriculum 2 - Department 2

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_CONC_221

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_CONC_222

columns.name: SGBSTDN_MAJR_CODE_CONC_223

columns.name: SGBSTDN_PREV_CODE
columns.description: General Student record Progress Evaluation code. This code overrides the code in SHRTTRM.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_TERM_CODE_PREV
columns.description: General Student record Progress Evaluation term. This is the term for which the progress evaluation code override becomes effective.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_CAST_CODE
columns.description: General Student record Combined Academic Standing code. This code overrides the code in SHRTTRM.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_TERM_CODE_CAST
columns.description: General Student record Combined Academic Standing term. This is the term for which the combined academic standing code override becomes effective.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA SOURCE: Source system that created or updated the row

columns.name: SGBSTDN_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The most recent user to create or update a record.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_SCPC_CODE
columns.description: STUDENT CENTRIC PERIOD CYCLE CODE: Cycle Code for the student centric period.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key

columns.name: SGBSTDN_VERSION
columns.description: VERSION: Optimistic lock token.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code.

columns.name: SGBSTDN_GUID
columns.description: GUID: Global Unique Identifier to uniquely identify the record of a resource for integration.
